{{Quote|I don't mean to sound greedy, but may I have your meat?|Reeft|<ref name="TRF" />}}
'''Reeft''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dressellian/Legends|Dressellian]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and a contemporary of the famed [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. Jedi Reeft served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Reeft was [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Like all [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]] to the Order, Reeft was sorted into a [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan]] of fellow younglings. Making fast friends with fellow clan members [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Garen Muln]], and [[Bant Eerin/Legends|Bant Eerin]], the group received their earliest lessons from clan [[Jedi instructor|instructor]] [[Docent]] [[Vant]]. Known for his enduring appetite, Reeft would often finish any remnants of food left on his friends' plates in the [[Jedi Temple refectory/Legends|Temple's dining halls]].<ref name="TRF" /> After years of studying together, the wrinkle-faced boy was chosen by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Binn Ibes]] for one-on-one training as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] around his [[44 BBY/Legends|thirteenth birthday]].<ref name="TCT" />

After years of study with Master Ibes, Reeft was tasked with completing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]]; a series of tests which he passed successfully under the eyes of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] and [[Battlemaster/Legends|Temple battlemaster]]. Ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], Reeft pursued independent studies throughout his service during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Jedi Reeft was assigned to apprehend the notorious thief [[Rotar Lopani]] on [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]]. As Reeft tracked the criminal through a crowded market, the [[Xexto/Legends|Xexto]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Tosinqas]] trailed him and was eventually able to get to Lopani first. As Reeft approached Lopani, Tosinqas jumped from the shadows and killed Lopani. Startled when Reeft drew his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] in a defensive position, Tosinqas charged the Jedi and, misjudging the lightsaber's length, [[Sai tok/Legends|bisected]] himself on the blade.<ref name="HNN53">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|53|jediwatch/13425_2.html|Three-Way Hunt Ends with Two Dead}}</ref>

Reporting the incident to the High Council and returning the bodies to the Temple, Reeft came under political fire from the angered [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]] who filed a complaint with the [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]]. The Guild's stance was that the Order operated in relative secret, and stated that better communication between the Jedi Temple would have prevented an incident like the one involving Tosinqas.<ref name="HNN53" />
